name: Self-Improving flatmachines_cli — coding machine with experiment loop

description: Baseline: 10/100 — only self-contained checks pass (no HyperAgents/pi-autoresearch deps). No experiment tracking, no self-improve config, no improve module yet.

asi.hypothesis: establish baseline score for self-improvement capabilities
asi.missing: experiment.py, improve.py, self_improve.yml, CLI integration, tests

description: Full self-improvement infrastructure: experiment.py (tracker with run/log/metrics/archive/noise_floor), improve.py (SelfImprover + SelfImproveHooks), self_improve.yml machine config, CLI/REPL integration, 59 new tests. Score 10→100.

asi.hypothesis: Build complete self-improvement infrastructure in one shot: experiment tracking + improve orchestration + machine config + CLI integration + tests
asi.new_files: experiment.py (430L), improve.py (240L), config/self_improve.yml, test_experiment.py (37 tests), test_improve.py (24 tests)
asi.architecture: ExperimentTracker handles run/log/metrics/persist, SelfImprover wraps tracker with evaluate/benchmark, SelfImproveHooks bridges to FlatMachine actions
asi.next_focus: deepen quality - more integration tests, improve.py machine config validation, agent config YAML

description: Complete real-world readiness: agent configs (analyzer.yml, implementer.yml), 24 integration tests, self-benchmark on own codebase, todos.txt upstream notes, adapter-agnostic profile model. All 3 phases 100/100. Score 200→300.

asi.hypothesis: Address all user-identified gaps: missing agent configs, no integration tests, no todos, no self-benchmark
asi.gaps_closed: agent configs exist+valid, profile-based model for adapter swap, agent refs resolve, integration tests, self-benchmark on own codebase, todos.txt upstream notes

description: Git integration (commit/revert/auto on keep/discard) + confidence scoring + 24 new tests. All 4 phases 100/100. Score 300→400. 1062 total tests passing.

asi.hypothesis: Add git operations and confidence scoring to complete autonomous loop features
asi.new_features: git_commit(), git_revert(), auto-commit on keep, auto-revert on discard, confidence_score() method, git_enabled flag

description: Phase 5 added: profiles.yml, validate_self_improve_config(), stress tests, 22 new validation tests. Score 400→480/500. Missing 20pts from unimplemented 21c check.

asi.hypothesis: Add Phase 5 with profiles.yml, validation API, and stress tests

description: Phase 5 complete: regression check + profiles tests + docstring check. All 5 phases 100/100. Score 480→500/500. 1084 tests passing.

asi.hypothesis: Implement missing benchmark checks (21c regression, 21d profiles tests, 21e docstring) to reach 500/500
asi.phase5_checks: profiles.yml(20), validation API(25), stress persistence(20), tests(35)=100
